ddls:
CREATE TABLE "phrases" (
  "phrase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each phrase */,
  "phrase_text" TEXT /* The idiomatic phrase in a specific language */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the language of the phrase */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the phrase was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the phrase */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the phrase */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the phrase is active or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("phrase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_phrases_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES phrase_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "translations" (
  "translation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each translation */,
  "phrase_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the phrase being translated */,
  "translation_text" TEXT /* The translated phrase text */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the language of the translation */,
  "translated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who translated the phrase */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Approval status of the translation (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("translation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_translations_phrase_id FOREIGN KEY ("phrase_id") REFERENCES phrases ("phrase_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "examples" (
  "example_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each example */,
  "phrase_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the phrase associated with the example */,
  "example_sentence" TEXT /* The example sentence using the phrase */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the example was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the example */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("example_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_examples_phrase_id FOREIGN KEY ("phrase_id") REFERENCES phrases ("phrase_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., learner, educator, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  "code" TEXT /* ISO code for the language */,
  "native_name" TEXT /* Native name of the language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user performing the action */,
  "phrase_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the phrase involved in the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., viewed, translated) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., phrase, translation, example) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_phrase_id FOREIGN KEY ("phrase_id") REFERENCES phrases ("phrase_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user providing feedback */,
  "phrase_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the phrase related to the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Content of the feedback text */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback was created */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating provided by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_phrase_id FOREIGN KEY ("phrase_id") REFERENCES phrases ("phrase_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "educators" (
  "educator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each educator */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user record of the educator */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Short biography of the educator */,
  "subject_specialty" TEXT /* Subject specialty of the educator */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the educator is affiliated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("educator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_educators_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admins" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admin */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user record of the admin */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions granted to the admin (e.g., manage users, edit phrases) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admins_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "phrase_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "phrase_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "phrase_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the phrase */,
  "related_phrase_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the related phrase */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., synonym, antonym) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_phrase_relationships_related_phrase_id FOREIGN KEY ("related_phrase_id") REFERENCES phrases ("phrase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_phrase_relationships_phrase_id FOREIGN KEY ("phrase_id") REFERENCES phrases ("phrase_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "phrase_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "phrase_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the phrase */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_phrase_tags_phrase_id FOREIGN KEY ("phrase_id") REFERENCES phrases ("phrase_id")
)
